tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS Public Workshop 2

payload.description: Second public workshop for Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service, hosted by NYCDOT and MTA, held at P.S. 306 Queens from 7-9 PM. 54 participants attended for design input on SBS implementation.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues

payload.location_text: Between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues, reducing congestion by eliminating need for general traffic to merge at overpass south of Metropolitan Avenue

normalized_location.raw_text: Between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Curbside bus lanes between 101 and Plattwood Avenues

payload.location_text: Between 101 and Plattwood Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Curbside bus lanes allowing buses to reach subway connections faster without removing travel lanes

normalized_location.raw_text: Between 101 and Plattwood Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Service road reorganization Park Lane South to Rockaway Boulevard

payload.location_text: Service roads between Park Lane South and Rockaway Boulevard on Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Service roads striped with paint to create one travel lane and one parking lane, replacing existing one travel lane, one very narrow travel lane, and one parking lane. Improves safety and provides painted pedestrian refuges at key crosswalks.

normalized_location.raw_text: Service roads between Park Lane South and Rockaway Boulevard on Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Offset bus lane operating hours Eliot to Metropolitan

payload.location_text: Between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Offset bus lanes in operation Monday-Friday from 7am to 7pm

normalized_location.raw_text: Between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: Curbside bus lanes near Liberty Avenue

payload.location_text: Southbound between 101st Avenue and Rockaway Boulevard, northbound between Plattwood and Liberty Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Curbside bus lanes near Liberty Avenue. On the last block approaching Liberty Avenue and Rockaway Boulevard, bus lane in effect from 7 AM to 7 PM. On blocks farther from Liberty/Rockaway, bus lanes in effect from 7-10 AM and 4-7 PM. Parking allowed when bus lanes not in effect; passenger drop-offs allowed at all times.

normalized_location.raw_text: Southbound between 101st Avenue and Rockaway Boulevard, northbound between Plattwood and Liberty Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: SBS travel time reduction 15-20%

payload.description: Expected travel time reduction from Select Bus Service on other SBS routes, used as benchmark for Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards

tool_args.label: 54 participants attended workshop

payload.claim_text: 54 participants attended the workshop which included a presentation, an interactive break-out session about street designs and bus stops, and a question and answer session.
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS Public Workshop 2

tool_args.label: 33 configurations created by attendees

payload.claim_text: Of the 33 different configurations created by meeting attendees: 15 included curbside or offset bus lanes; 13 included center median bus lanes; 5 included no bus lanes; 8 included bike lanes; 30 included parking; 18 included left and/or right turn lanes.
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS design exercise

tool_args.label: Community input process for SBS planning

payload.claim_text: Long-term planning for Select Bus Service includes a community input process comprised of a Community Advisory Committee, public workshops, and meetings with Community Boards and community stakeholders/institutions.
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: SBS recommended by Congested Corridors Study

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service was recommended as part of the Congested Corridors Study, which began in 2008 and consisted of five years of public outreach to determine ways to reduce congestion and improve safety along Woodhaven Boulevard.
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard

tool_args.label: More than 30,000 bus riders along corridor

payload.claim_text: More than 30,000 riders travel along the corridor by bus.
payload.subject: Woodhaven Boulevard
payload.description: Number of current daily bus riders along Woodhaven Boulevard
